observation.summary: Approval wait timeout ownership was prose-only while the rule spans provider draft mapping, semantic activity, session clocks, and reducer timeout behavior.

hypothesis.summary: A manifest can prove approval requests map to ApprovalRequested, reset SemanticIdle, remain bounded by session timers, and reduce timeout to provider cancellation.

execution.summary: Read idle-watchdog and provider-event-draft manifests, scan session timer/reducer sources, and upload approval timeout evidence.

evaluation.summary: The verifier rejects manifest drift, source ownership drift, and generated doc drift.

retrospective.summary: Approval wait timeout docs are generated while existing session/reducer code remains the implementation evidence.

evidence.proves: approval wait timeout manifest matches related manifests and runtime sources
public CI uploads approval wait timeout evidence
